name: boost-pc-desktop
description: Modern gaming booster desktop app for FPS optimization on Windows.
author: boost-pc-desktop

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,el -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5175 && electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run license:bundle-url && npm run build:client && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:admin: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run dist --prefix admin-console
